title: Preservation of signedness flag on attribute values inconsistent
body:
### Version

a8a65db0bc4682883b57895afe9197ae5ed48089

### On which OS did this happen?

macOS

### Reproduction Steps

```
read_rtlil <<EOF
attribute \a 32's00000000000000000000000000000100
attribute \b 32'00000000000000000000000000000100
attribute \c 5's00100
attribute \d 5'00100
module \top
end
EOF
write_rtlil /tmp/save.il
design -reset
read_rtlil /tmp/save.il
write_rtlil /tmp/save.il
design -reset
read_rtlil /tmp/save.il
dump
```

### Expected Behavior

Values of `a` and `b` are distinguishable

### Actual Behavior

```
autoidx 1

attribute \d 5'00100
attribute \c 5's00100
attribute \b 4
attribute \a 4
module \top
end
```

Values for `c` and `d` are distinguishable, not so for `a` and `b`

This is due to the autoint branch in `RTLIL_BACKEND::dump_const`
code_blocks:
read_rtlil <<EOF
attribute \a 32's00000000000000000000000000000100
attribute \b 32'00000000000000000000000000000100
attribute \c 5's00100
attribute \d 5'00100
module \top
end
EOF
write_rtlil /tmp/save.il
design -reset
read_rtlil /tmp/save.il
write_rtlil /tmp/save.il
design -reset
read_rtlil /tmp/save.il
dump

autoidx 1

attribute \d 5'00100
attribute \c 5's00100
attribute \b 4
attribute \a 4
module \top
end
